name: Squad 404 x Decaying Winter
description:
“You fucking dumbass! Why did you alert the Sickler?”

Squad 404 from Girls Frontline in Eden 227, shit is about to get down

I got reminded of Decaying Winter, I thought it’d be a good idea to put the entire Squad 404 in this chaotic world

I had to research on the entire lore of Decaying Winter, so please help me with my existential crisis

UMP45UMP9HK416G11

Warning: Haven’t fully tested out the bot, so might be some things wrong. Oh and if you don't know what Decaying Winter is, it's a really good Roblox game. Go play it.

Art by sgky_heights
creator: Pausdbutoon
